=== bd94-07-14.txt
===================
===================
===================
Still On The Road  Bob Dylan 1994: Europe Summer Tour
15180 Schwarzl Freizeitzentrum
Graz, Austria
14 July 1994

Taper: S.H.

DISK 1 ----- 54:33
1. Jokerman
2. If Not For You
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. Every Grain Of Sand
5. Tangled Up In Blue
6. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
7. Mama, You Been On My Mind

DISK 2 ----- 50:36
1. Masters Of War
2. Love Minus Zero/No Limit
3. God Knows
4. I And I
5. Maggie's Farm

6. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
7. It Ain't Me, Babe



Concert # 584 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 9 of the 1994 Europe Summer Tour. 1994 concert #
48.
Concert # 128 with the 9th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxter (pedal
steel guitar & electric slide guitar), John Jackson (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Winston Watson (drums &
percussion).
7-9, 14 acoustic with the band
4-7, 13, 14 Bob Dylan harmonica.
5 new songs (35%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 105 minutes.
Session info updated 15 December 1994.
